(born November 9, 2002) is an American dancer and actress. She debuted as a dancer on [NBC](/wiki/NBC "NBC")'s [*World of Dance*](/wiki/World_of_Dance_(TV_series) "World of Dance (TV series)") [first season](/wiki/World_of_Dance_(season_1) "World of Dance (season 1)"), where she finished as runner-up to [Les Twins](/wiki/Les_Twins "Les Twins").[[1]](#cite_note-1) She specializes in dance styles such as jazz, contemporary, lyrical, musical theatre, and technique.[[2]](#cite_note-:0-2)

Blewett, Matt (August 9, 2017). ["A star is born on national TV as Eva Igo takes second on World of Dance"](https://mndancenews.com/2017/a-star-is-born-on-national-tv-as-eva-igo-takes-second-on-world-of-dance/).
["DANCERS CHOICE AWARDS 2018"](https://industrydanceawards.com/dancers-choice-awards/2018/nominees#most-fierce-dancer-under-18). *MOST FIERCE DANCER UNDER 18 Winner*.
["WorldFest Houston, Texas"](https://www.imdb.com/event/ev0000708/2019/1/). *WorldFest Houston, USA 2019 Awards*. Retrieved 14 April 2019.

Montgomery, Daniel (July 25, 2018). ["Eva Igo ('World of Dance') faced her toughest challenge ever during The Duels"](https://www.goldderby.com/article/2018/eva-igo-world-of-dance-duels-performance-video-news-20646847915/amp/). *Gold Derby*. Retrieved November 13, 2018.

**Eva Igo** (born November 9, 2002) is an American dancer and actress. She debuted as a dancer on [NBC](/wiki/NBC "NBC")'s [*World of Dance*](/wiki/World_of_Dance_(TV_series) "World of Dance (TV series)") [first season](/wiki/World_of_Dance_(season_1) "World of Dance (season 1)"), where she finished as runner-up to [Les Twins](/wiki/Les_Twins "Les Twins").[[1]](#cite_note-1) She specializes in dance styles such as jazz, contemporary, lyrical, musical theatre, and technique.[[2]](#cite_note-:0-2)

## Personal life

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Eva_Igo&action=edit&section=1 "Edit section: Personal life")]

Igo was born and raised in Saint Paul, Minnesota. She started dancing at three years old at Larkin Dance Studio in Maplewood, Minnesota, and she was competing by age five.[[2]](#cite_note-:0-2)

## Career

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Eva_Igo&action=edit&section=2 "Edit section: Career")]

In 2017, at the age of fourteen, Igo competed in the [first season](/wiki/World_of_Dance_(season_1) "World of Dance (season 1)") of NBC's [*World of Dance*](/wiki/World_of_Dance_(TV_series) "World of Dance (TV series)"). She finished second to [Les Twins](/wiki/Les_Twins "Les Twins") by 0.1 points and came first in the Junior Division. She returned in Season 2.

Following her participation in World of Dance, she performed across the United States and Canada on the World of Dance LIVE Tour in 2017 and headlined at VidCon 2018.[[3]](#cite_note-3)

Igo was also featured in [Jennifer Lopez](/wiki/Jennifer_Lopez "Jennifer Lopez")'s music video, "[Amor, Amor, Amor](/wiki/Amor,_Amor,_Amor "Amor, Amor, Amor")," directed by [Jessy Terrero](/wiki/Jessy_Terrero "Jessy Terrero").[[4]](#cite_note-4)

She won the Industry Dance Awards[[5]](#cite_note-5) for "Most Fierce Dancer Under 18".[[6]](#cite_note-6) She was also nominated for a [People's Choice Award](/wiki/People%27s_Choice_Awards "People's Choice Awards") as the "Competition Contestant of 2018".

In 2019, Igo made a guest appearance on [Season 5](/wiki/Dance_Plus_season_5 "Dance Plus season 5") of [Dance Plus](/wiki/Dance_Plus "Dance Plus") in [Mumbai](/wiki/Mumbai "Mumbai").[[7]](#cite_note-7)

Igo worked with [Welling Films](/wiki/Welling_Films "Welling Films") in AXI: Avengers of Xtreme Illusions, alongside actors/dancers Preslee Bishop, Chloe Klitus, and [Darrin Dewitt Henson](/wiki/Darrin_Dewitt_Henson "Darrin Dewitt Henson"). She made her feature film debut in 2018, starring in The Last Astronaut, directed by Shawn Welling.[[8]](#cite_note-8) She won "Rising Star" at [WorldFest Houston](/wiki/WorldFest-Houston_International_Film_Festival "WorldFest-Houston International Film Festival") in 2019 for her role as Evena in *The Last Astronaut*.[[9]](#cite_note-9)

Igo is a teaching artist working with dancers across the continental United States. She is currently faculty at Ultimate Dance Tour, and teaches with Librate Artists.[[10]](#cite_note-10)[[2]](#cite_note-:0-2)
